meta.author: NoxDev sample
meta.summary: Campaign module 2. Gated behind module 1 (requires world.vault_opened). The companion-bound artisan takes the ember to a drowned bazaar; her ff-2d6 sheet is DERIVED from her companion interchange. Proves a second character tier + carried world/character state.

passages.title: The Drowned Pier
passages.text: Lantern-boats crowd a flooded arcade where a whole bazaar sank and refused to close. The ember-amulet at your throat draws eyes the moment you step onto the pier — everyone here knows what an unspent ember is worth.

choices.text: Wade in to find the ember-broker.

passages.title: The Ember-Broker
passages.text: The broker is a heron-thin woman who prices you before she prices the ember. A good bargain here is a duel of nerve and patience. Test your Skill.

passages.title: The Terms
passages.text: The broker lays out her offer: a black PEARL that opens the tidewrights' quarter, in trade for a promise against the ember — not the ember itself, not yet. It is a fair, dangerous deal.

choices.text: Seal the bargain and take the pearl.
Refuse and keep the ember whole.

passages.title: A Promise Against the Ember
passages.text: You press your thumb to the broker's ledger and the pearl is yours. The tidewrights' quarter opens ahead — and a debt, ember-shaped, follows you in.

passages.title: The Ember Kept
passages.text: You close your hand over the ember and step back from the ledger. The broker only smiles; the quarter stays shut, and you leave the market as you came, one relic richer and one door poorer.
